symbols: Winged figure wreathed in light — a supernatural or angelic being manifesting to human perception
Figure in red standing apart — the human witness receiving the vision
Burst of golden and white light — divine or transcendent illumination
description: A dreamlike, luminous composition with two figures. On the left, a dark winged figure with a textured, feathered or scaled appearance emerges from a cloud of golden and amber light. On the right, a slender figure draped in red stands still, facing the apparition. Between and above them, the sky erupts in swirls of gold, white, and blue light. The painting is highly abstract and atmospheric, with forms dissolving into color and light.
